description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

The city has published the Fiscal Year 2024 (Reiwa 6) financial statements. In addition to the traditional cash-basis accounting, the city has been preparing "unified standard financial statements" since the Fiscal Year 2016 settlement that allow for understanding of stock information on social capital (assets) and local government bonds (liabilities). The Fiscal Year 2024 version includes general account financial statements, consolidated financial statements, and a fixed assets register. Each document consists of the main statement, supplementary notes, and explanatory notes.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/sogoseisakubu/zaiseika/zaimushohyo/13351.html
